content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 — WARN — release_notes.txt says "TaskTide public beta" and "still testing the new sync feature, so expect rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2)
Pierre: Apple's guideline 2.2 requires App Store builds to be complete and production-ready, not betas — beta distribution belongs in TestFlight. Your release notes explicitly call this a "public beta" and warn users to "expect rough edges," which may trigger review questions about whether the build is finished. Consider rewriting the notes to describe the shipping feature without beta/testing language, or move beta distribution to TestFlight.
